metadata.title:
Advertisement for Stone Masons Tips Off
Big Lockout Scheme and Labor Lead


ers Will Try to Block the Game.

pages.raw_text:
What appears to be a deep laid
scheme on the part of the Master
Builders association to undermine
the building trades council has come
to light today. The master builders
have been forced to advertise for nom
union masons to complete their plans,
which to date are said to have been
working entirely to the satisfaction
of the association.


Now that the advertising has been
started, the association has simply
tipped its hand to the unions. The
latter are now preparing quietly to
checkmate the next great move on
the part Of those who are trying to
disrupt the organization by putting
to work host of non-union men on
all the buildings now in course of
erection.


For several weeks past there has
been much talk regarding a proposed
lockout of all union builders. Until
today this talk has been treated with
the greatest derision by the union
lists. 1t is said the Building Trades
council will now proceed to get back
at the Master Builders association
and fight them with their own weap-
